subject: Shuckle — small yellow worm-like Pokemon peeking out from a rounded red spotted shell, resting on rocky ground in a grassy outdoor setting
description: A small yellow worm-like creature peeks out from a large round red shell covered in circular spots or holes. The shell dominates the lower portion of the frame, resting on rocky ground. The creature's yellow limbs and small head are visible poking from the openings of the shell. The background shows warm green grass and a bright yellow-green sky suggesting an outdoor setting. The composition is low-angle and ground-level, making the shell appear large. The overall palette is warm yellows, reds, and greens.
foreground: round red spotted shell with small yellow worm-like creature peeking out, resting on rocks
background: warm green grass and bright outdoor sky
